fields.title: Investigate oracle subagent invalid custom-tool exposure
fields.description: Oracle subagent spawn rejects bd/web_search_exa/crawling_exa/get_code_context_exa as invalid tools even though callers still include them. Find the regression introduced today and identify the exact commit/files responsible.
fields.notes: Root cause identified. No commits since midnight touched worker tool wiring. The regression was introduced by commit 636c7fc (feat(agent): add subagent tool allowlists) on 2026-03-26 09:51. That commit added tools frontmatter to bundled agents (oracle/finder/librarian/review/painter) including bd and Exa tools. applyAgentToolAllowlist validates configured tools against session.getAllTools(), but worker sessions are created in src/agent/worker.ts with customTools limited to agent + apply_patch (+ submit_result). Because bd/web_search_exa/crawling_exa/get_code_context_exa are never injected into worker sessions, spawn now fails with Invalid tools for agent errors. Tests covered synthetic allowlists only and missed bundled agent definitions vs worker custom tool inventory.
fields.close_reason: Investigation complete: regression introduced by commit 636c7fc; follow-up tracked in tau-bms.4
